source_pr.title: test: make test TestUpdateWithTableReadLockWillFail stable
source_pr.body:

symptoms: Flaky behavior / race-detector failures due to mutating global config (`EnableTableLock`) directly inside a test
failure_signature: DATA RACE / shared-state interference on global config `EnableTableLock`
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to unsafe global configuration mutation: it directly set `config.GetGlobalConfig().EnableTableLock = true` and later restored it, which can race with other concurrent tests/goroutines reading the global config and can leak state across tests. This PR stabilizes it by switching to `config.UpdateGlobal(...)` (thread-safe update) and `config.RestoreFunc()` to reliably restore global state after the test.
fix_pattern: Use `config.UpdateGlobal(...)` + `config.RestoreFunc()` instead of direct global config writes when toggling `EnableTableLock` in tests.
